name: Speaker's Sight Solar Warlock (Healer)
fragments: Ember of Empyrean, Ember of Solace, Ember of Benevolence, Ember of Torches
legendary_weapons: Heal Clip+Incandescent weapon (e.g. Aberrant Action); No Hesitation auto
key_mods: Helmet: Harmonic Siphon; Arms: Impact Induction, Focusing Strike; Legs: Innervation
stat_effects: Healing turrets give allies Cure + Restoration x2; Radiant +20% PvE via Torches; heal-on-ally triggers ~400% ability regen (see Ability Regen Factors)
what_it_does: Drops healing turrets that heal the whole team while Ember of Benevolence refunds your abilities fast, keeping Well and radiant near-permanent
gameplay_loop: Throw healing turret -> heal allies -> Benevolence refunds abilities -> melee for radiant -> repeat
artifact_mods: Flint Striker, Kindling Trigger, Heart of the Flame, Radiant Orbs, Elemental Benevolence, Beam Medic, Curative Orbs

name: Starfire Protocol Solar Warlock (Grenade DPS)
fragments: Ember of Ashes, Ember of Searing, Ember of Empyrean, Ember of Char
legendary_weapons: Solar weapon w/ Incandescent; fusion rifle
key_mods: Helmet: Harmonic Siphon; Arms: Impact Induction; surge mods on chest/legs
stat_effects: Touch of Flame doubles fusion grenade explosions; grenade kills refund Phoenix Dive; Well +25% weapon dmg in damage phase
what_it_does: Constant Fusion Grenade spam for add clear and DoT, with Well of Radiance for boss phases
gameplay_loop: Fusion grenade -> double explosion -> kill refunds class ability -> repeat; pop Well for DPS
artifact_mods: Kindling Trigger, Rays of Precision, Solar Fulmination, Radiant Orbs, Argent Ordnance

name: Sunbracers Solar Warlock (Add Clear)
fragments: Ember of Ashes, Ember of Searing, Ember of Empyrean, Ember of Resolve
stat_effects: Powered melee kill grants ~5s of unlimited Solar grenades for wave clear; surge mods stack with grenade spam
what_it_does: Near-infinite Solar grenade add clear after a single melee kill
gameplay_loop: Melee kill -> unlimited grenades window -> chain Solar grenades -> refresh on kills
artifact_mods: Kindling Trigger, Rays of Precision, Solar Fulmination, Radiant Orbs, Elemental Coalescence

name: Getaway Artist Prismatic Warlock (Turret Spam)
fragments: Facet of Courage, Facet of Command, Facet of Balance, Facet of Purpose
stat_effects: Getaway converts grenade into a roaming Arc Soul; Bleak Watcher stasis turret freezes; two turrets control the room
what_it_does: Permanent turret uptime (Arc Soul + Bleak Watcher) for hands-off add control
gameplay_loop: Grenade -> Arc Soul; melee -> Bleak Watcher turret; let turrets clear while you shoot
artifact_mods: Shock and Awe, Dielectric, Transference, Galvanic Armor, Lightning Strikes Twice

name: Celestial Nighthawk Prismatic Hunter (Boss DPS)
fragments: Facet of Courage, Facet of Dawn, Facet of Ruin, Facet of Command
legendary_weapons: Apex Predator (Bait and Switch); stasis primary
key_mods: 3x Solar Surge; Siphon; Heavy Ammo Finder
stat_effects: Golden Gun becomes one 650% shot (~24k, see Super Damage & Uptime); Still Hunt = a 2nd Golden Gun; kills refund 33% super; Facet of Dawn radiant +20% PvE
what_it_does: Top-tier burst boss DPS: stack two Celestial Golden Guns (super + Still Hunt) in one window
gameplay_loop: Precision kills build super -> Transcend + grenade -> fire Still Hunt then Golden Gun super
artifact_mods: Sniper's Meditation, Limit Break, Flint Striker, Radiant Orbs, Solo Operative, Wished Into Being
gear_set: Iron Battalion (4pc Supercyclical) or Cruel Electrum

name: Liar's Handshake Prismatic Hunter (Melee Survivability)
exotic_armor: Liar's Handshake (or Relativism: Spirit of Liar + Caliban)
fragments: Facet of Purpose, Facet of Protection, Facet of Hope, Facet of Courage
key_mods: Heavy Handed; Recuperation, Absolution; Powerful Attraction
stat_effects: Combination Blow x3 + Liar's counterpunch = high sustained melee damage and heal-on-hit; near-unkillable in melee range
what_it_does: Infinite melee loop that heals you on every hit; dodge resets Combination Blow
gameplay_loop: Dodge -> Combination Blow -> heal + refund -> repeat; grapple melee to reposition
artifact_mods: Power From Pain, Galvanic Armor, Shieldcrush, Dielectric, Counter Energy
gear_set: Crota's Memory (Power of the Son DR) or Dark Age

name: Prismatic Consecration Titan (Survivability/Clear)
exotic_armor: Stoicism: Spirit of Synthoceps + Spirit of Inmost Light (or Synthoceps)
fragments: Facet of Balance, Facet of Protection, Facet of Ruin, Facet of Purpose
key_mods: Helmet: Hands-On + Siphon; Arms: Heavy Handed; Legs: Better Already, Absolution, Recuperation; 2pc Ferropotent/Smoke Jumper
stat_effects: Consecration slam ignites for big AoE; Knockout heal on melee; high ability uptime + Inmost Light buff
what_it_does: Dominant Titan loop: melee/grenade into Consecration slams that ignite groups while you stay tanky
gameplay_loop: Frenzied Blade -> Consecration slam -> ignite + orbs -> Inmost regen -> repeat
artifact_mods: Shieldcrush, Galvanic Armor, Solar Fulmination, Power From Pain, Counter Charge

name: Prismatic Invis Consecration Titan (Solo)
exotic_armor: Stoicism: Spirit of the Assassin + Contact
fragments: Facet of Dawn, Facet of Hope, Facet of Balance, Facet of Protection, Facet of Purpose
key_mods: Siphon + Hands-On; resist mods; Health Font
stat_effects: Consecration grants invis (Assassin) + amplified + radiant; strong self-sustain for solo content
what_it_does: Solo-friendly Consecration variant that goes invisible on slam to reset fights
gameplay_loop: Consecration slam -> invis + radiant -> reposition -> repeat
artifact_mods: Power From Pain, Maligned Harvest, Shieldcrush, Photonic Flare

name: Strand Banner of War Titan (Wishful Ignorance)
fragments: Thread of Warding, Thread of Generation, Thread of Fury, Thread of Transmutation
stat_effects: Wishful Ignorance gives 4 Frenzied Blade charges + boosted Flechette Storm; Banner of War heals and escalates melee damage
what_it_does: Relentless Strand melee engine: constant Frenzied Blade + Flechette with Banner healing and damage ramp
gameplay_loop: Frenzied Blade x4 -> Flechette Storm -> Banner of War pulses heal + buff -> repeat
artifact_mods: Strand Soldier, Tightly Woven, Shieldcrush, Threaded Blast, Horde Shuttle

name: Arc Thundercrash Titan (Burst DPS)
fragments: Spark of Shock, Spark of Magnitude, Spark of Resistance, Spark of Feedback
legendary_weapons: Apex Predator or other heavy for follow-up
stat_effects: Cuirass boosts Thundercrash +55%; melee final blows grant super energy for frequent nukes
what_it_does: Single-target burst nuke: slam Thundercrash for a huge one-hit boss damage spike
gameplay_loop: Build super via melee/orbs -> Thundercrash slam -> follow up with heavy
artifact_mods: Thunderous Retort, Limit Break, Shock and Awe, Dielectric, Flashover

name: Void Tether Hunter (Invis/Debuff Support)
fragments: Echo of Persistence, Echo of Obscurity, Echo of Cessation, Echo of Harvest
stat_effects: Tether weakens enemies for the team (-30% PvE / -15% per Damage Buffs Debuffs Exact); Gyrfalcon volatile rounds; near-constant invis
what_it_does: Team-support and survivability via invisibility and Weaken; Tether sets up group damage
gameplay_loop: Dodge/finisher -> invis -> volatile rounds clear -> Tether boss for team DPS
artifact_mods: Volatile Marksman, Void Flux, Maligned Harvest, Expanding Abyss, Supernova, Power From Pain

name: Void Ward of Dawn Titan (Team Buff)
fragments: Echo of Persistence, Echo of Cessation, Echo of Exchange, Echo of Undermining
stat_effects: Ward of Dawn grants Weapons of Light +25% weapon damage to allies who pass through; overshields for survivability
what_it_does: Classic team damage buff: drop the bubble for Weapons of Light during boss phases
gameplay_loop: Drop Ward of Dawn -> team shoots through for +25% -> blind via Saint-14
artifact_mods: Protective Breach, Void Hegemony, Expanding Abyss, Supernova

name: Frost-Armor Gunslinger (Prismatic Hunter)
super: Golden Gun: Marksman (alt: Silence and Squall)
fragments: Facet of Protection, Facet of Purpose, Facet of Courage, Facet of Dawn
legendary_weapons: Stasis primary w/ Headstone; boss-DPS heavy
key_mods: Helmet: Hands-On, Heavy Ammo Finder, Siphon; Arms: Heavy Handed; Chest: resist; Legs: Recuperation, Absolution, Surge; Class: Powerful Attraction
stat_effects: Renewal Duskfield cuts incoming enemy damage; Frost Armor stacks DR; Stylish Weaken -15% PvE; Dawn Radiant +20% PvE; Golden Gun ~25k burst (Super Damage & Uptime)
what_it_does: Burst-DPS Hunter wrapped in a Stasis Frost Armor and Duskfield shell, so you can stand in the open during damage phases and take almost nothing
gameplay_loop: Stand in Renewal Duskfield -> Stasis precision hits build Frost Armor -> Snare Bomb or dodge to Weaken and go invisible -> snipe and shatter for clear and heals -> Golden Gun plus Still Hunt on the boss
source: Theorycrafted from this workbook + Monument of Triumph mod list (June 2026)
verified: theorycrafted - confirm Frost Armor uptime on Prismatic in-game
artifact_mods: Wind Chill, Armor of Eramis, Frost Renewal, Power From Pain, Shieldcrush, One With Frost, Sniper's Meditation, Limit Break, Conductive Cosmic Crystal, Hail the Storm, Elemental Siphon, Frigid Glare
gear_set: Crystocrene (4pc From the Storm: Frost Armor) or Deep Explorer (Bittersweet heal)
